name: Cinnamon Flop (Jvb)
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together 1 cup sugar, 2 cups flour, and 2 teaspoons baking powder.
2. Add the melted butter and milk, stirring until well blended.
3. Divide the mixture evenly between two 9-inch pie pans or one 9" x 13" pan, greasing them well.
4. Sprinkle the tops with additional flour (optional), then brown sugar and cinnamon. Push small pieces of butter into the dough to create holes; this will get gooey as it bakes.
5. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 30 minutes.
